description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Slot none; Price 3,000 gp (lesser), 11,000 gp (normal), 24,500 gp (greater); Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are disruptive as though using the Disruptive Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Disruptive Spell; Cost 1,500 gp (lesser), 5,500 gp (normal), 12,250 gp (greater)
